raw_consumer_statement:
American Express Credit Card failed to counter fraudulent activities against Merchant XXXX in Dispute Case XXXX. 

A home rental provider on XXXX XXXX abused consumer terms and services, and XXXX XXXX failed to resolve my dispute. I filed the case with American Express under XXXX, and American Express was unable to offer a fair resolution either. 

Case background : XXXX host coerced me for early check-out as a result of my family emergency, and she confirmed that she would refund the remaining days of my monthly stay under the condition that someone had booked the rest of the period. I checked in on XX/XX/XXXX and originally planned to leave on XX/XX/XXXX but had early checked out on XX/XX/XXXX, under her verbal agreements. Someone booked a monthly stay from XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX, and therefore Ive effectively occupied the room for 6 days from XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX, and Im requesting a pro-rated refund for my original purchase of XXXX. XXXX host denied the request, despite she had verbally agreed to the new terms of partial refunds.
